text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar professed his voters' decision for Hungary to become a European country again, in which the crowd responded with "Russian's go home!": "Victory because our country has made a decision and wants to live again.…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar on Victor Orban congratulating him: "A little over an hour ago, the nearest prime minister, Viktor Orbán, called me on the phone, Viktor Orbán called me on the phone, and congratulated us on our victory." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）宣称他的选民决定让匈牙利重新成为一个欧洲国家，人群对此回应道：‘俄罗斯人回家去！’：‘胜利，因为我们的国家已经做出了决定，想要再次生活……’” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马扎尔谈及维克多·欧尔班（Victor Orban）向他表示祝贺：“一个多小时前，最近的总理维克多·欧尔班给我打了电话，维克多·欧尔班给我打了电话，祝贺我们取得胜利。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The futures contracts for Brent crude oil jump to $102.60 per barrel, and US crude oil hits a record high of $105.25 per barrel.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 布伦特原油期货合约跳涨至每桶102.60美元，美国原油价格创下每桶105.25美元的历史新高。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Commander of the Quds Force of the IRGC, Qa’ani: — The unified resistance front has a strong and effective presence throughout the region and is waiting for the enemies of humanity. — The US and the Zionist regime should remember how they fled empty-handed from heroic Yemen, Bab al-Mandeb, and the Red Sea. — Now they will leave the region without any achievements.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队圣城旅指挥官卡尼（Qa’ani）：——统一抵抗阵线在整个地区拥有强大而有效的存在，正在等待人类的敌人。——美国和犹太复国主义政权应该记住他们是如何从英雄的也门、曼德海峡和红海空手而逃的。——现在他们将毫无建树地离开该地区。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇭🇺 Hungarian PM elect Peter Magyar on serving Hungary: “I will serve as long as it benefits the nation. I will do so as long as I can. God bless Hungary, God bless every good person.” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇷🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar professed his voters' decision for Hungary to become a European country again, in which the crowd responded with "Russian's go home!": "Victory because our country has made a decision and wants to live again. It wants to be a European country again." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇭🇺 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马扎尔谈及为匈牙利服务：‘只要对国家有利，我就会服务。只要我能，我就会这样做。上帝保佑匈牙利，上帝保佑每一个善良的人。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇷🇺 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马扎尔宣称他的选民决定让匈牙利重新成为一个欧洲国家，人群对此回应道：‘俄罗斯人回家去！’：‘胜利，因为我们的国家已经做出了决定，想要再次生活。它想再次成为一个欧洲国家。’ @wfwitness

text: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）：在47年来最高级别的密集会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当距离“伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录”仅一步之遥时，我们遇到了极端主义、不断变化的立场和封锁。毫无教训可言。

text: OSINTdefender According to the Wall Street Journal, citing people familiar with the situation, U.S. President Donald J. Trump is considering resuming limited strikes inside Iran as a method to break the current impasse in the peace talks process with Iran. Per the report, a less likely scenario, that is also on the table, is resuming high tempo strikes on Iran as well. Should such measures be employed, they would be in addition to the blockade of maritime traffic from Iranian ports announced earlier by U.S. Central Command. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华尔街日报》援引知情人士的话称，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普正在考虑恢复对伊朗境内的有限打击，以此作为打破当前与伊朗和平谈判僵局的一种方法。据报道，另一种可能性较小但也在考虑之中的方案是恢复对伊朗的高强度打击。如果采取此类措施，它们将是对美国中央司令部早些时候宣布的对伊朗港口海上交通封锁的补充。推文

text: The Spectator Index President Trump is looking at resuming limited military strikes in Iran, and 'could also resume a full-fledged bombing campaign' according to Wall Street Journal report. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043453298838306908/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普总统正在考虑恢复对伊朗的有限军事打击，据《华尔街日报》报道，“也可能恢复全面的轰炸行动”。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043453298838306908/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix This organization should find increased difficulties and problems in its everyday life….. Without America, NATO is nothing. Our treaty allies would be wise to remember that. @VictoriaCoates https://twitter.com/Heritage/status/2043442968472785205/video/1 - Heritage Foundation tweet

text: OSINTdefender Iran’s Ambassador to Pakistan, Reza Amiri Moghadam, says in a post earlier on X that this weekend’s peace talks in Islamabad were “not an event but a process,” providing a much more optimistic view of the recent talks than U.S. Vice President JD Vance and other Iranian officials, stating that the talks “laid the foundation” of a future peace agreement with the United States. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·莫加达姆（Reza Amiri Moghadam）早些时候在X上发帖称，本周末在伊斯兰堡举行的和平谈判“不是一个事件，而是一个过程”，这比美国副总统JD·万斯和其他伊朗官员对最近会谈的看法要乐观得多，他表示，这些会谈“为未来与美国达成和平协议奠定了基础”。推文

text: Open Source Intel Don Tzu. Whoever made this understood the Hormuz situation better than most think tanks. Someone made this and I need to know who. Beer’s on me. Who is the OP? https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043452290930024853/photo/1 tweet

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Canada's Defense Chief explains because the military removed "systemic barriers," she was able to become the 1st woman in the role, identifying her biggest obstacles as "Perceptions that women are weak and they can't be in a combat role and be a mother at the same time." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043452152375304534/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel WSJ REPORTS: President Trump is weighing renewed limited strikes on Iran alongside the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz to break the deadlock in peace talks. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 《华尔街日报》报道：特朗普总统正在权衡对伊朗恢复有限打击，并配合美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁，以打破和平谈判的僵局。推文

text: Open Source Intel Spending some of my life tracking Islamic fanatical terrorists taught me one thing: You don’t negotiate with terrorists. But if you absolutely must, you don’t sit down until they’re on their knees. Until then, you squeeze so hard. No pauses, no goodwill gestures, no off-ramps. You squeeze until they beg. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 我一生中花了一些时间追踪伊斯兰狂热恐怖分子，这教会了我一件事：你不能与恐怖分子谈判。但如果你非谈不可，在他们跪下之前，你绝不能坐下来。在那之前，你要施加巨大的压力。没有暂停，没有善意姿态，没有退路。你要施压直到他们乞求。推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran warns Americans to ‘enjoy’ today’s gas prices. Trump’s Hormuz ‘blockade’ will make Americans miss $4 gas. Speaker Ghalibaf posts map of gas stations near White House.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗警告美国人“享受”今天的油价。特朗普的霍尔木兹“封锁”会让美国人怀念4美元的油价。议长卡利巴夫发布了白宫附近加油站的地图。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Pentagon to blockade IRAN’S ports. “Come closer. Iran will sink your ships.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 五角大楼将封锁伊朗港口。“靠近点。伊朗会击沉你们的船。”

text: Trump is considering next steps against Iran. Options include limited military strikes. A full-scale bombing campaign is on the table but unlikely, since it could destabilize the region and lead to a prolonged conflict. The U.S. may also try a temporary Hormuz blockade while pushing allies to take on more responsibility. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 特朗普正在考虑针对伊朗的下一步行动。选项包括有限的军事打击。全面轰炸行动也在考虑范围内，但不太可能，因为它可能会破坏该地区的稳定并导致长期冲突。美国也可能尝试临时封锁霍尔木兹海峡，同时推动盟友承担更多责任。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: Trump and advisers are weighing limited strikes on Iran alongside a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz after the collapse of peace talks in Pakistan. Officials say other options include a wider bombing campaign or a temporary blockade while allies take over long term escort operations in the waterway. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：在巴基斯坦和平谈判破裂后，特朗普及其顾问正在权衡对伊朗的有限打击，并配合对霍尔木兹海峡的海军封锁。官员们表示，其他选项包括更广泛的轰炸行动或临时封锁，同时由盟友接管长期的护航行动。@wfwitness

text: And, oil prices up again.
text_zh: 而且，油价再次上涨。

But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned Good will begets good will. Enmity begets enmity.” tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇭🇺 Hungarian PM elect Peter Magyar on serving Hungary: “I will serve as long as it benefits the nation. I will do so as long as I can. God bless Hungary, God bless every good person.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡ 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马扎尔谈及为匈牙利服务：“只要对国家有利，我就会服务。只要我能，我就会这样做。上帝保佑匈牙利，上帝保佑每一个善良的人。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command forces announced that they will begin a blockade of all maritime traffic entering or exiting Iranian ports on 13 April at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The blockade will be enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran has currently a dozen tankers in the Gulf of Oman holding about 23 million barrels of crude oil. They will likely be the first target of the US Navy. They could also seek refuge in friendly waters such as in Pakistan territorial waters and thus escape the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国中央司令部部队宣布，他们将于4月13日美国东部时间上午10:00开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的海上交通。封锁将公正地针对所有进入……的国家船只” ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗目前在阿曼湾有十几艘油轮，装载着约2300万桶原油。它们很可能成为美国海军的首要目标。它们也可能寻求在友好水域（如巴基斯坦领海）避难，从而逃避封锁。@wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar: We will renew and put on a strong foundation—and if possible, expand—the cooperation of the Visegrád Four. In this spirit, my first trip will be to Poland, to strengthen the thousand-year-old Polish-Hungarian friendship. My second trip will lead to Vienna, and the third to Brussels, so that we can bring home the EU funds that the Hungarian people are entitled to.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们将更新并建立一个坚实的基础——如果可能的话，扩大——维谢格拉德集团四国的合作。本着这种精神，我的第一次访问将是波兰，以加强千年来的波兰-匈牙利友谊。我的第二次访问将前往维也纳，第三次前往布鲁塞尔，以便我们能够带回匈牙利人民有权获得的欧盟资金。

text: Péter Magyar: Hungary will again be a strong ally in the European Union and NATO.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：匈牙利将再次成为欧盟和北约的强大盟友。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 The ceasefire between Russian and Ukrainian forces has officialy started. If everything goes as expected, fighting will continue until the end of the ceasefire on April 13. The fighting will then continue. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The Easter truce between Russia and Ukraine has officially ended. Clashes, FPV attacks have mostly ceased during the weekend with some exceptions. No glide bombs or drone were launched. This evening the launch of drones has already resumed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰军队之间的停火协议已正式开始。如果一切按预期进行，战斗将持续到4月13日停火结束。之后战斗将继续。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰之间的复活节休战已正式结束。周末期间，冲突和FPV攻击大多已停止，但有少数例外。没有发射滑翔炸弹或无人机。今晚无人机的发射已经恢复。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 JD Vance does the walk of shame after failed talks in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 JD·万斯在伊斯兰堡谈判失败后进行了羞耻的步行。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚠️ 🇮🇷 BREAKING: The United States will blockade all ships entering or exiting Iranian ports beginning tomorrow, April 13 at 10am ET per CENTCOM. 🔸 Applies to vessels of ALL nations, including China, Russia, India 🔸 Covers all Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman 🔸 CENTCOM says it will not impede transit through Hormuz to non-Iranian ports 🔸 Mariners ordered to monitor Notice to Mariners broadcasts and contact US naval forces on channel 16 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚠️ 🇮🇷 快讯：据中央司令部称，美国将于明天4月13日美国东部时间上午10点开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的船只。🔸 适用于所有国家的船只，包括中国、俄罗斯、印度 🔸 覆盖阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾的所有伊朗港口 🔸 中央司令部表示，不会阻碍通过霍尔木兹海峡前往非伊朗港口的过境 🔸 命令海员监控海员通知广播，并在16频道与美国海军部队联系 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: Our country wants to live again. It wants to be a European country again. Crowd chants: "Russians go home!"
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们的国家想要再次生活。它想再次成为一个欧洲国家。人群高呼：“俄罗斯人回家去！”

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament, on control of the Strait of Hormuz: "If they had realized we would achieve such a position and take control of the Strait of Hormuz, perhaps they would have been more cautious in going to war with us." Now not…" 🇮🇷 "It must be accepted that now the world has four superpowers. One of the superpowers is the Islamic Republic." Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament: America caused Iran to become an international power sooner than America thought. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊（Haji Babaei）谈及对霍尔木兹海峡的控制：‘如果他们意识到我们会达到这样的地位并控制霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们在与我们开战时会更谨慎。’ 现在不是……” 🇮🇷 “必须承认，现在世界有四个超级大国。其中一个超级大国是伊斯兰共和国。” 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊：美国促使伊朗比美国想象的更早成为国际大国。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: NOW: Péter Magyar: TISZA not only won this election, but every sign points towards having a strong two-thirds majority in the new National Assembly.
text_zh: 现在：彼得·马扎尔：TISZA不仅赢得了这次选举，而且所有迹象都表明在新国民议会中拥有强大的三分之二多数席位。

text: NEW: Regional countries are racing to bring the U.S. and Iran back to the negotiating table after marathon peace talks in Islamabad ended without a deal. Despite defiant statements from the U.S. and Iran the door remains open for further diplomacy and a second round of talks could be held within days. Regional countries were also in consultation with the U.S. to secure an extension of two-week ceasefire. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 最新消息：在伊斯兰堡马拉松式和平谈判无果而终后，地区国家正竞相促使美国和伊朗回到谈判桌前。尽管美国和伊朗发表了挑衅性声明，但外交大门依然敞开，第二轮会谈可能在几天内举行。地区国家也一直在与美国磋商，以确保延长两周的停火。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command forces announced that they will begin a blockade of all maritime traffic entering or exiting Iranian ports on 13 April at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The blockade will be enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or departing Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. CENTCOM will not impede vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz to and from non‑Iranian ports. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部部队宣布，他们将于4月13日美国东部时间上午10:00开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的海上交通。封锁将公正地针对所有进出阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾伊朗港口的各国船只。中央司令部不会阻碍通过霍尔木兹海峡往返非伊朗港口的船只。@wfwitness

text: BREAKING: CENTCOM says the U.S. will begin a naval blockade of all ships entering or leaving Iranian ports on April 13 at 10 a.m. ET. The blockade applies to vessels of all nations but will not affect ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz to non-Iranian ports. Mariners are advised to follow official notices and maintain communication with U.S. naval forces in the region.
text_zh: 快讯：中央司令部表示，美国将于4月13日美国东部时间上午10点开始对所有进出伊朗港口的船只实施海军封锁。封锁适用于所有国家的船只，但不会影响通过霍尔木兹海峡前往非伊朗港口的船只。建议海员遵循官方通知，并与该地区的美国海军部队保持联系。

text: Zelensky: I congratulate Peter Magyar and the TISZA party on their convincing victory. It’s important when a constructive approach wins. Ukraine has always strived for good-neighborly relations with everyone in Europe, and we are ready to develop cooperation with Hungary. We are ready for meetings and joint constructive work for the benefit of both peoples, as well as for peace, security, and stability in Europe.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：我祝贺彼得·马扎尔和TISZA党取得令人信服的胜利。建设性的方法获胜很重要。乌克兰一直致力于与欧洲所有人建立睦邻友好关系，我们准备发展与匈牙利的合作。我们准备好进行会晤和共同的建设性工作，以造福两国人民，并促进欧洲的和平、安全与稳定。

text: NOW: Péter Magyar: Together we have replaced the Orbán regime, together we have liberated Hungary, we have taken back our homeland.
text_zh: 现在：彼得·马扎尔：我们共同取代了欧尔班政权，我们共同解放了匈牙利，我们夺回了我们的家园。

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on X. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）在X上发文。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
